form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (30.43) in a Restricted WIN, finishing a 11 length sixth. Goes well out of this box with a win and two minors. Looks well placed and should feature.

form.formComment: Good effort to score just four days ago over 461m at Hobart by a nose in a Grade 5. Can make it back to back wins.

form.formComment: At the last outing finished last on April 2 over 461m at Hobart behind If Ever beaten 20 lengths (27.11) in a Grade 5. Mixing her form but shapes as a genuine chance under these conditions.
